exclude_characters.description: A string of specific characters to be excluded from the password.

exclude_lowercase.description: A boolean to exclude lowercase letters from the password if set to true.

exclude_numbers.description: A boolean to exclude numbers from the password if set to true.

exclude_punctuation.description: A boolean to exclude punctuation characters from the password if set to true.

exclude_uppercase.description: A boolean to exclude uppercase letters from the password if set to true.

include_space.description: A boolean to include spaces in the password if set to true.

password_length.description: The desired length of the generated password.

require_each_included_type.description: A boolean to require at least one character from each included character type.
